seasonality: Event-driven: activity spikes around Bitcoin halving cycles and Nakamoto upgrade milestones, with Q1 2024 showing outsized volume tied to sBTC testnet launches and Ordinals-adjacent speculation.
rationale: DefiLlama reports Stacks TVL near $171M as of late May 2025, with annualized protocol fees estimated at roughly $4.2M based on trailing 30-day on-chain fee data extrapolated; at a ~$775M fully-diluted market cap this implies a P/S near 185, which is elevated but reflects early-stage Bitcoin L2 optionality premium. STX stacking (PoX) yields approximately 7–10% APR in BTC rewards, with the 'real' component (BTC paid by miners) around 7.5% and the remainder inflationary STX emissions; post-Nakamoto upgrade throughput improvements and sBTC launch are the primary catalysts for the accelerating growth trend.
